Name: JigglerBehaviorTargetBoneRateParam
Description: Determines the target rate for a jiggle bone.

Fields.Name: Rotation %: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation rate on the X-axis for this bone.

Fields.Name: Rotation %: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation rate on the Y-axis for this bone.

Fields.Name: Rotation %: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation rate on the Z-axis for this bone.
